overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City, transitioning from narrow commercial streets lined with cardboard boxes and graffiti to a wide futuristic plaza dominated by towering megabuildings with external staircases. The sequence captures the dense urban environment with dynamic lighting and detailed cyberpunk architecture.

stacked cardboard boxes and debris piled against the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow commercial street with a red bike lane, passing utility poles and stacks of cardboard boxes. Storefronts with neon signs line the right side while parked cars sit along the left. The scene is enclosed by mid-rise buildings with billboards visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley with graffiti and discarded furniture

events.description: passes a distinctive red couch discarded on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrow street passing pedestrians and street furniture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in turquoise jacket standing near a storefront entrance

entered.detail: bright red leather couch discarded on the sidewalk against the wall
concrete wall covered in black spray paint graffiti tags
orange and white striped construction barriers blocking the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The street continues with a gritty urban aesthetic featuring a discarded red couch and extensive graffiti on the right wall. Construction barriers appear in the distance indicating road work ahead. The camera passes by pedestrians and storefronts with neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with construction barriers and traffic

events.description: character crosses from the sidewalk onto the street, navigating around construction barriers
exits the narrow street into a wider intersection with palm trees and larger buildings

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while navigating around construction barriers and passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving down the street past the character

entered.detail: traffic signal showing red light above the intersection
tall palm trees lining the wider street ahead
large modern building with reflective glass facade
painted white crosswalk lines on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street through a construction zone marked by orange barriers, transitioning from the narrow alley to a wider urban intersection. Vehicles pass by on the left while palm trees and modern glass buildings become visible in the distance, signaling a change to a more open downtown area.

events.description: enters a vast plaza dominated by a massive futuristic megabuilding with external staircases

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward the massive futuristic architecture

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright pink jacket walking ahead toward the megabuilding

entered.detail: massive towering structure with external staircases and escalators, covered in advertisements
elevated walkway connecting buildings above the street level
yellow benches and planters arranged along the left side of the plaza
large digital screens displaying advertisements on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast futuristic plaza dominated by an enormous megabuilding with external staircases and massive digital billboards. Palm trees line the walkway and yellow seating areas are visible on the left. The architecture shifts dramatically to futuristic cyberpunk styling with towering structures and elevated pedestrian bridges.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty, narrow commercial street that gradually opens into a vast, futuristic urban plaza. It begins by following a character past neon-lit storefronts and stacks of cardboard boxes along a red bike lane, moving through an enclosed corridor of mid-rise buildings. As the camera progresses, the environment becomes more weathered with graffiti-covered walls and discarded furniture before approaching a construction zone marked by orange barriers. The scene then shifts as the character crosses the street, leaving the cramped alley behind for a wider intersection where palm trees and glass skyscrapers first appear. Finally, the view expands into a massive plaza dominated by a towering megabuilding with external staircases and giant digital billboards, completing the transition into a high-tech cyberpunk landscape.
